productName: Heavenly Buds - INFUSED Bubble Hash .5g Little Snappers 2 pack - Apple Jackz DOH - 1g
description: A hybrid infused joint built on Apple Jackz and elevated with potent extract, blended in for an even burn and a noticeably bigger hit than flower alone. More potent than flower alone, with more intense effects — a crisp, sweet apple flavor, delivering an even, best-of-both-worlds feel. Pace yourself.
